testsGenerated.description: Shared root locator for staged Works architecture fitness tests.
P0 scaffold governance tests for Story 1.1 structure, package management, kernel purity, and submodule safety.
P1 characterization tests for EventStore surfaces that Works Story 1.1 must verify before later domain stories depend on them.

testsGenerated.content:
# Generated Works Test Automation Artifacts

These files are staged because the root `Hexalith.Works` scaffold does not exist yet. Promote the C# files into the focused Story 1.1 architecture test project after the scaffold creates `Hexalith.Works.slnx`, `Directory.Packages.props`, and the Works test project structure.

The generated tests intentionally cover scaffold governance and EventStore API-surface readiness only. Domain behavior tests for `CreateWorkItem` should be generated after `Hexalith.Works.Contracts` and `Hexalith.Works.Server` exist.
testsGenerated.description: Staging note for generated test artifacts.

summary: Generated 6 staged backend governance/characterization tests for Story 1.1. Files are staged under _bmad-output/test-artifacts/generated-tests because the root Works scaffold and focused test project do not exist yet.
